summary: The file contains several accessibility issues, including missing alt attributes for images, improper use of ARIA roles, and insufficient focus indicators.

issues.description: Image elements must have an alt attribute to provide alternative text for screen readers.
issues.recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute to the tag.

issues.description: Image elements must have an alt attribute to provide alternative text for screen readers.
issues.recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute to the tag.

issues.description: Removing focus outlines can make it difficult for keyboard users to navigate.
issues.recommendation: Avoid removing focus outlines or provide an alternative visible focus indicator.

issues.description: Clickable elements should use semantic HTML elements like <button> for better accessibility.
Autoplaying videos can be disruptive and should provide controls to pause or stop.
issues.recommendation: Add controls to the <video> element and avoid autoplay.

issues.description: The aria-pressed attribute must have a valid value (true, false, or mixed).
issues.recommendation: Use a valid value for aria-pressed.

issues.description: Form inputs should have associated labels for better accessibility.
issues.recommendation: Add a <label> element for the input field.

issues.description: Form inputs should have associated labels for better accessibility.
issues.recommendation: Add a <label> element for the input field.
